## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, or explain why validation was not run.

```sh
go test ./...
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Tests or docs were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] The code uses only the Go standard library.
- [ ] No third-party Go module dependencies were added.
- [ ] User-facing output and docs avoid decorative emoji.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed for local file, socket, and command execution risks.

## Notes

Add reviewer context, follow-ups, or known tradeoffs.
